property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

testcase.name: postKafkaEvent_shouldReturn2xx
testcase.system-out:
21:07:04.329 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.images.PullPolicy -- Image pull policy will be performed by: DefaultPullPolicy() 21:07:04.332 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.ImageNameSubstitutor -- Image name substitution will be performed by: DefaultImageNameSubstitutor (composite of 'ConfigurationFileImageNameSubstitutor' and 'PrefixingImageNameSubstitutor') 21:07:04.397 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Testcontainers version: 1.21.4 21:07:04.797 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.dockerclient.DockerClientProviderStrategy -- Loaded org.testcontainers.dockerclient.NpipeSocketClientProviderStrategy from ~/.testcontainers.properties, will try it first 21:07:05.207 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.dockerclient.DockerClientProviderStrategy -- Found Docker environment with local Npipe socket (npipe:////./pipe/docker_engine) 21:07:05.208 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Docker host IP address is localhost 21:07:05.233 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Connected to docker: Server Version: 29.2.1 API Version: 1.53 Operating System: Docker Desktop Total Memory: 3917 MB Labels: com.docker.desktop.address=npipe://\\.\pipe\docker_cli 21:07:05.437 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 -- Creating container for image: testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 21:07:05.679 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.RegistryAuthLocator -- Credential helper/store (docker-credential-desktop) does not have credentials for https://index.docker.io/v1/ 21:07:05.889 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 -- Container testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 is starting: 4cc8b037c3b76802a5f0947a2b9f414875547a289b8a8421443d22d4f90af5f2 21:07:06.533 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 -- Container testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 started in PT1.0955795S 21:07:06.549 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.RyukResourceReaper -- Ryuk started - will monitor and terminate Testcontainers containers on JVM exit 21:07:06.549 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Checking the system... 21:07:06.551 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- ✔︎ Docker server version should be at least 1.6.0 21:07:06.552 [main] INFO tc.rabbitmq:3.13-management-alpine -- Creating container for image: rabbitmq:3.13-management-alpine 21:07:06.672 [main] INFO tc.rabbitmq:3.13-management-alpine -- Container rabbitmq:3.13-management-alpine is starting: 1edd1b1a7e6c24a7792d94d7f5ef1db7b66bfa280288546f3649ec1fb1ff8b33 21:07:16.957 [main] INFO tc.rabbitmq:3.13-management-alpine -- Container rabbitmq:3.13-management-alpine started in PT10.4054676S 21:07:16.959 [main] INFO tc.confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.6.0 -- Creating container for image: confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.6.0 21:07:17.051 [main] INFO tc.confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.6.0 -- Container confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.6.0 is starting: fc4e9aa402559a9410cb100daffad5afd7ca677d090993f68c14c934e6bf0836 21:07:25.531 [main] INFO tc.confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.6.0 -- Container confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.6.0 started in PT8.5722511S 21:07:25.771 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [pe.resteban.events.rest.EventControllerIT]: EventControllerIT does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:07:26.356 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration pe.resteban.events.EventDrivenStarterApplication for test class pe.resteban.events.rest.EventControllerIT

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\reste\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: postRabbitEvent_shouldReturn2xx
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-30T21:07:40.210-05:00 INFO 25280 --- [event-driven-starter] [o-auto-1-exec-2] p.r.e.r.publisher.NotificationPublisher : Publishing NotificationMessage to exchange 'notifications.exchange' with routing key 'notification': NotificationMessage[id=MSG-001, type=EMAIL, payload=test payload]
